subcategory: Animated canvas background with organic vine growth
use_cases: Landing page hero backgrounds with organic animated effects
Interactive website decorations that respond to mouse movement
Ambient visual elements for creative portfolios and agency sites
Dynamic backgrounds for event or product launch pages
Atmospheric design elements for entertainment and media platforms
ai_summary: A canvas-based animated background component that renders organic vine growth effects following mouse movement. The living vines use semi-transparent neon green colors with fade-out lifecycles, creating an ethereal, naturalistic aesthetic. Perfect for adding immersive, interactive ambient visuals to landing pages or hero sections without heavy 3D rendering overhead.
